message:
test(patterns): Add proptest-based fuzz testing for command classification

Adds comprehensive property-based tests to stress test command pattern
classification with randomly generated inputs (bd-2kdm).

**Proptest strategies:**
- arbitrary_string: pure random strings up to 500 chars
- command_like_string: command prefixes with random suffixes
- known_command_with_flags: valid commands with random flag combinations
- unicode_and_control_chars: strings with unicode and control characters
- shell_special_commands: commands with shell operators (|, &&, ||, etc.)

**Property tests:**
- Classification never panics on arbitrary input
- Detected kind matches command base expectations
- Parsing handles unicode gracefully
- Shell pipelines processed consistently
- Performance under random load remains stable

These tests ensure the pattern matching code handles edge cases and
malformed input without crashing, improving robustness of the command
classification system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
